title: Travel Mapper
description: Free, unlimited travel route animator inspired by mult.dev — pick locations worldwide, choose transport modes, and export a 3D Cesium animation of your journey.
overview: A full-stack application to visualize travel routes as 3D animations — inspired by mult.dev but free with unlimited entries. Born from a hiking trip through the Southwest, it lets users select locations around the world, choose a mode of transport for each leg, and export a cinematic 3D map animation of the full journey.

sections.heading: What It Does
bullets: Add unlimited stops anywhere in the world and assign a transport mode (car, plane, train, etc.) to each leg
Preview routes on an interactive Cesium 3D globe with real geographic context
Export a 3D animation of the full trip path — a shareable visual story of where you've been or plan to go
Designed as a free alternative to paid travel-animation tools with no entry limits

sections.heading: Technical Stack
bullets: Frontend: React + Vite with Cesium for 3D globe rendering and route visualization
Backend: FastAPI (Python) serving route data, transport logic, and export endpoints
Monorepo structure with separate frontend/ and backend/ directories
